content: اَلْجَمْعَةُ اَلْأَلْمَانِيَّةُ فَتَحَتْ حَدِيثًا فَرْعًا فِي مِصْرَ
translations: eng:the german university newly opened a branch in Egypt

transcriptions.arabizi: ilgamaAa il'almanya fatahat hadeethan farAagideed fi masr
